industries.name: Transportation

industries.name: Corporate

industries.name: Sports & Arenas

industries.name: Control Rooms

case_studies.title: State Highway Traffic Control Center Video Wall Upgrade
case_studies.summary: An 18-meter-wide LED video wall consolidates live camera feeds and traffic data for faster incident response.
case_studies.bodyHtml:
The State Highway Traffic Operations Center needed a seamless, high-brightness canvas to monitor hundreds of roadside cameras and sensors.

Our 18-meter-wide fine-pitch LED wall delivers 24/7 reliability, low latency, and redundancy across controllers and power supplies.

case_studies.title: Munich Central Station LED Departure Boards
case_studies.summary: A 12-meter-wide outdoor-rated LED board improves timetable visibility in bright daylight conditions.
case_studies.bodyHtml:
Deutsche Bahn replaced aging LCD boards with a high-brightness LED system that remains legible in direct sunlight.

The 12-meter-wide display integrates with existing passenger information systems and supports multilingual layouts.

case_studies.title: City Metro Platform Countdown Displays
case_studies.summary: 8-meter platform displays show next-train information, service alerts, and safety messages.
case_studies.bodyHtml:
The transit authority modernized passenger communications with synchronized LED displays across multiple platforms.

Fine-pitch modules and wide viewing angles ensure readability even on crowded platforms.

case_studies.title: Global QSR Chain Digital Menu Board Rollout
case_studies.summary: Over 1,200 restaurants upgraded to dynamic LED menu boards for dayparting and promotions.
case_studies.bodyHtml:
The client replaced printed menus with three 55-inch LED menu boards per counter, enabling instant price and content changes.

Centralized content management allows regional promotions and seasonal campaigns with minimal effort.

case_studies.title: Premium Burger Concept Immersive Menu Wall
case_studies.summary: A bezel-free LED menu wall creates a cinematic ordering experience in a fast-casual restaurant.
case_studies.bodyHtml:
The restaurant uses a continuous LED canvas above the counter to showcase menu items, social content, and ambient visuals.

Fine-pitch indoor modules ensure crisp readability at close viewing distances.

case_studies.title: Supermarket End-Cap Promotion LED Displays
case_studies.summary: Compact LED displays on aisle end-caps drive impulse purchases with dynamic promotions.
case_studies.bodyHtml:
LED end-cap displays replaced static signage in key categories such as beverages and snacks.

Store teams can trigger weekly offers and seasonal campaigns with pre-built templates.

case_studies.title: Corporate HQ Lobby Brand Wall
case_studies.summary: A 10-meter lobby LED wall welcomes visitors with brand storytelling and live data.
case_studies.bodyHtml:
The HQ lobby features a fine-pitch LED wall that transitions between brand films, live social feeds, and real-time KPIs.

The system is integrated with the corporate content platform for automated scheduling.

case_studies.title: Executive Briefing Center Presentation Wall
case_studies.summary: An ultra-wide LED canvas replaces projectors in an executive briefing center.
case_studies.bodyHtml:
Corporate teams use the LED wall for interactive demos, multi-source presentations, and virtual events.

The fine-pitch display supports HDR content and flexible picture-by-picture layouts.

case_studies.title: National Stadium Main LED Scoreboard
case_studies.summary: A massive LED scoreboard brings replays and stats to life for 60,000 fans.
case_studies.bodyHtml:
The new LED scoreboard offers ultra-high brightness and wide viewing angles to ensure visibility from every seat.

Redundant power and data paths support uninterrupted operation during live broadcasts.

case_studies.title: Indoor Arena Ribbon Boards and Fascia Displays
case_studies.summary: Continuous LED ribbon boards deliver sponsorship inventory and fan engagement content.
case_studies.bodyHtml:
The arena deployed LED fascia displays across the bowl to increase sponsorship revenue and enhance in-game entertainment.

Dynamic content zones allow simultaneous display of stats, prompts, and partner messages.

case_studies.title: Regional Utility Control Room LED Video Wall
case_studies.summary: A 14-meter LED wall consolidates SCADA, mapping, and incident management views for operators.
case_studies.bodyHtml:
The utility modernized its operations center with a low-latency LED wall that supports 24/7 monitoring.

Redundant controllers and hot-swappable power supplies maximize uptime.

case_studies.title: Security Operations Center Situational Awareness Wall
case_studies.summary: Fine-pitch LED displays deliver crystal-clear visualization of cameras and analytics dashboards.
case_studies.bodyHtml:
The SOC upgraded from a tiled LCD array to a seamless LED canvas for improved readability.

The system supports secure, role-based content layouts across analyst workgroups.

job_postings.description: Design and validate LED display hardware, including power, timing, and thermal management, for next-generation indoor and outdoor products.

job_postings.title: Embedded Firmware Engineer
job_postings.description: Develop embedded firmware for LED controllers, implementing image processing, diagnostics, and monitoring features.

job_postings.description: Lead enterprise sales opportunities for corporate lobby walls, briefing centers, and meeting room LED deployments across North America.

job_postings.title: Field Service Technician - Outdoor LED
job_postings.description: Install, commission, and service outdoor billboard and stadium LED displays across the southern US region.

job_postings.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
job_postings.description: Plan and execute digital campaigns, including product launches, webinars, and case study promotions for EMEA.

job_postings.title: Manufacturing & Operations Supervisor
job_postings.description: Supervise LED module assembly lines, ensure quality standards, and coordinate with global logistics teams.

job_postings.title: HR Business Partner - Europe
job_postings.description: Support managers across European offices with talent acquisition, performance management, and employee engagement initiatives.

job_postings.title: Engineering Intern - LED Systems
job_postings.description: Assist the engineering team with prototyping, testing, and documentation for indoor fine-pitch LED displays.

job_postings.title: Inside Sales Representative
job_postings.description: Qualify inbound leads, prepare quotations, and support regional account managers for LED display opportunities.

products.name: IND-FP1.2 Pro Fine-Pitch LED Wall
products.summary: Premium 1.2 mm fine-pitch indoor LED wall for high-end corporate lobbies and control rooms.
products.detailHtml:
The IND-FP1.2 Pro is designed for flagship lobby installations and 24/7 control rooms. With a 1.2 mm pixel pitch and calibrated color performance, it delivers close-up viewing quality and seamless large canvases up to 18 meters wide.

  • 1.2 mm pixel pitch
  • 800 nits brightness
  • Redundant power and data options

products.name: IND-FP1.5 Eco Fine-Pitch LED Wall
products.summary: Cost-effective 1.5 mm fine-pitch LED solution for corporate and retail video walls.
products.detailHtml:
The IND-FP1.5 Eco balances image quality and total cost of ownership for medium to large video walls starting at 4 meters wide.

  • 1.5 mm pixel pitch
  • 900 nits brightness
  • Front serviceability for fast maintenance

products.name: IND-FP0.9 Elite MicroLED Wall
products.summary: Ultra-fine 0.9 mm microLED wall for mission-critical visualization and premium boardrooms.
products.detailHtml:
The IND-FP0.9 Elite delivers near-retina pixel density for close viewing distances such as meeting rooms, studios, and command centers.

  • 0.9 mm microLED technology
  • HDR-ready processing
  • 24/7 operation rating

products.name: IND-P2.5 Comfort Series
products.summary: Versatile 2.5 mm indoor LED series for retail and corporate video walls.
products.detailHtml:
The IND-P2.5 Comfort series is ideal for viewing distances of 3 meters and beyond, offering an attractive balance between cost and performance.

  • 2.5 mm pixel pitch
  • 1000 nits brightness
  • Lightweight cabinets for simple mounting

products.name: IND-P2.9 EnergySaver Series
products.summary: Energy-efficient 2.9 mm indoor LED series optimized for low power consumption.
products.detailHtml:
The IND-P2.9 EnergySaver provides up to 25% lower power draw compared to typical 2.9 mm products, reducing operating costs for large installations.

  • 2.9 mm pixel pitch
  • 420 W/m² max power consumption
  • Tool-less front access modules

products.name: QSR Menu Board 55 Eco
products.summary: Entry-level 55" indoor LED menu board for QSR and fast-casual restaurants.
products.detailHtml:
The QSR Menu Board 55 Eco is a budget-friendly choice for restaurants upgrading from printed menus to digital content.

  • Optimized for 24/7 operation
  • Standard 55" form factor
  • Pre-calibrated color profiles for food imagery

products.name: QSR Menu Board 55 Plus
products.summary: Enhanced-brightness 55" LED menu board with fine-pitch 1.5 mm pixel spacing.
products.detailHtml:
The QSR Menu Board 55 Plus adds brightness and clarity for restaurants with higher ambient lighting while maintaining an affordable price point.

  • 1.5 mm pixel pitch for crisp text
  • 800 nits brightness
  • Ideal for triple-panel menu configurations

products.name: QSR Menu Board 55 Ultra
products.summary: Premium 55" high-brightness LED menu board suitable for both indoor and window-facing installations.
products.detailHtml:
The QSR Menu Board 55 Ultra offers elevated brightness and finer pixel pitch for demanding environments and brand-conscious operators.

  • 1.2 mm pixel pitch
  • Up to 1000 nits brightness
  • Supports portrait or landscape mounting

products.name: OUT-BB P10 Roadside Billboard
products.summary: Robust 10 mm outdoor LED billboard for standard roadside installations.
products.detailHtml:
The OUT-BB P10 Roadside is a workhorse platform for digital out-of-home operators, offering high brightness and IP65 protection for harsh environments.

  • 10 mm pixel pitch
  • 6500 nits typical brightness
  • Front or rear service options

products.name: OUT-BB P8 Prime Billboard
products.summary: Higher-resolution 8 mm outdoor LED billboard for premium roadside and urban locations.
products.detailHtml:
The OUT-BB P8 Prime delivers sharper content for closer viewing distances and dense urban traffic corridors.

  • 8 mm pixel pitch
  • 7500 nits brightness for sunlit conditions
  • IP65-rated weather protection

products.name: OUT-BB P6 UltraBright Billboard
products.summary: Ultra-high-brightness 6 mm LED billboard platform for flagship roadside and transport locations.
products.detailHtml:
The OUT-BB P6 UltraBright is engineered for maximum impact in sun-exposed installations such as highways, airports, and busy interchanges.

  • 6 mm pixel pitch
  • Up to 9000 nits brightness
  • IP65 with conformal-coated electronics

products.name: OUT-TR P6 Transport Hub Display
products.summary: Outdoor 6 mm LED display optimized for train and bus station departure boards.
products.detailHtml:
The OUT-TR P6 Transport Hub Display is tuned for high legibility of text and symbols in transportation environments.

  • 6 mm pixel pitch
  • 5500 nits brightness
  • Supports redundant data paths

products.name: CR-FP1.2 CommandWall
products.summary: 1.2 mm control room LED wall platform for 24/7 mission-critical environments.
products.detailHtml:
The CR-FP1.2 CommandWall is purpose-built for traffic management centers, utilities, and SOCs requiring high resolution and reliability.

  • 1.2 mm pixel pitch
  • 700 nits calibrated brightness
  • Hot-swappable power and data modules

products.name: RS-P3.9 Touring Panel
products.summary: 3.9 mm touring-grade LED panel for rental and staging applications.
products.detailHtml:
The RS-P3.9 Touring Panel features quick-lock mechanics, curvable frames, and high brightness for indoor and outdoor events.

  • 3.9 mm pixel pitch
  • Lightweight magnesium chassis
  • Fast rigging system

products.name: SC-Outdoor P10 Stadium Scoreboard
products.summary: Rugged 10 mm outdoor LED scoreboard platform for stadiums and arenas.
products.detailHtml:
The SC-Outdoor P10 Stadium Scoreboard delivers high-impact replays, stats, and sponsor content to fans in any seat.

  • 10 mm pixel pitch
  • 7000 nits brightness
  • IP66 weatherproof design

faq_items.question: What is the operating temperature range for your outdoor billboard displays?
faq_items.answer: Our standard outdoor billboard LED displays, including the OUT-BB series, are rated for continuous operation from -30�b0C to +50�b0C (-22�b0F to +122�b0F) at full brightness. In extremely hot climates, we recommend enabling automatic brightness limiting and ensuring adequate ventilation behind the cabinets. Always refer to the product-specific specification sheet for exact temperature and humidity ratings.

faq_items.question: What IP rating do your outdoor LED displays have?
faq_items.answer: Most of our outdoor LED display families are rated at IP65 on the front face and IP54 on the rear, providing full protection against dust ingress and low-pressure water jets from any direction. Some stadium and specialty products offer IP66 protection. Always check the specification sheet for the exact IP rating of the model you are using.

faq_items.question: How bright should an outdoor LED display be for roadside applications?
faq_items.answer: For typical roadside billboards, we recommend a calibrated brightness of at least 6,000 nits to ensure visibility in direct sunlight. Premium locations exposed to strong sun or with long viewing distances may benefit from 7,500�b0�a0�d7�a09,000 nits. All outdoor products include automatic brightness sensors and scheduling to reduce light output at night.

faq_items.question: Are your outdoor LED cabinets front serviceable?
faq_items.answer: Yes. Our latest OUT-BB and OUT-TR outdoor product lines are available in front-, rear-, or dual-service configurations. Front service uses magnetic or mechanical locks that allow module removal from the display face, which is ideal for installations where rear access is limited or impossible.

faq_items.question: How do I choose the right pixel pitch for an indoor LED wall?
faq_items.answer: A common rule of thumb is that the comfortable minimum viewing distance in meters is roughly equal to the pixel pitch in millimeters. For example, a 1.5 mm wall looks best from 1.5 m and beyond, while a 2.9 mm wall is suited to viewing distances of 3 m or more. For close-up environments like control rooms and conference rooms, we recommend 0.9�b0�a0�d7�a01.5 mm fine-pitch products.

faq_items.question: What is considered a fine-pitch indoor LED display?
faq_items.answer: Fine-pitch typically refers to LED displays with a pixel pitch of 2.0 mm or smaller. Our fine-pitch portfolio includes 0.9 mm, 1.2 mm, and 1.5 mm products designed for close viewing environments such as control rooms, executive briefing centers, and corporate lobbies.

faq_items.question: Which products are recommended for indoor digital menu boards?
faq_items.answer: For QSR and fast-casual restaurants, we recommend our 55-inch menu board families, which are optimized for 16:9 layouts, food imagery, and dayparting. These models offer sufficient brightness for indoor environments, support portrait or landscape mounting, and integrate with common media players and content management systems.

faq_items.question: What input sources do your LED controllers support?
faq_items.answer: Our current generation controllers support a wide range of inputs, including HDMI, DisplayPort, DVI, SDI (on selected models), and IP streams such as RTSP. Many systems also integrate with video processors, KVM solutions, and control room software platforms for source management and layout control.

faq_items.question: Do your LED displays support automatic color and brightness calibration?
faq_items.answer: Yes. Our control systems support factory calibration data and optional in-field recalibration using camera-based or sensor-based workflows. This ensures uniform color and brightness across the entire wall, even after module replacements or extended operation.

faq_items.question: What are the typical lead times for LED display orders?
faq_items.answer: Lead times depend on product family and configuration. Standard indoor and outdoor configurations are typically available within 6�b0�a0�d7�a010 weeks from order confirmation. Custom cabinet sizes, curves, and special finishes may require 12�b0�a0�d7�a016 weeks. Your sales representative can provide a firm schedule based on your project.

faq_items.question: How do I estimate the power consumption of an LED video wall?
faq_items.answer: Power consumption is usually specified as both maximum and typical watts per square meter (W/m�b2). To estimate, multiply the W/m�b2 value by the total display area in square meters. For sizing electrical infrastructure, use the maximum figure. For expected operating costs, the typical value is more representative of real-world content.

faq_items.question: What standard warranty do you offer on LED displays?
faq_items.answer: We provide a standard 3-year limited warranty on most LED display products, covering manufacturing defects in materials and workmanship. Extended warranties up to 5 years are available for many models and must be purchased at the time of order. Please refer to your sales agreement for specific terms.

faq_items.question: What is your LED pixel defect policy?
faq_items.answer: Our pixel policy follows international industry guidelines and defines acceptable limits for dark, bright, and color-shifted pixels per square meter. If a display exceeds these thresholds during the warranty period, affected modules will be repaired or replaced. A detailed pixel policy document is available on request from our support team.
